description: Resolve critical bugs, convention violations, and code smells identified in waiter module review (Task ses_0b2aa9e8bffezGOC11wB0laJ9w). Group into atomic, PR-able tasks.

tasks.description: Fix direct waiter routes bypassing dock (Option C): redirect /worker/{take-order,day-menu,orders} to /worker?tab=X; hoist <app-order-dock /> to worker-area.html with SERVICE/WAITER-only gate; dashboard reads ?tab on init. Files: app.routes.ts:107-110, worker-area.html, worker-area.ts, waiter-dashboard.ts.

DayMenu can add item before product options load. Disable order btn until options resolve; cancel stale requests; show error toast on options API failure; preload MasterData tables when component loads. day-menu.ts:56-105.

TodayOrders: fix UTC vs local date timezone bug (today-orders.ts:27-51), add realtime subscription mirroring kitchen.ts:115-190, add request cancellation to prevent stale-response races. today-orders.ts:42-65.
Carta product options modal: cancel stale getProductOptions() when pendingProduct changes so product A options don't populate product B modal. take-order.ts:70-89.
Fix determineWorkerType so SERVICE worker also triggers polling; align area-guard so WAITER+SERVICE consistent across /worker and direct routes. worker-area.ts:95-121, core/guards/area.ts:21-64.
Confirm before removing diner with items; remove selected diner not always last; show item/price totals across all diners. order-dock.ts:65-70, order-dock.html:36-40.
Recompute allDinerOrders at confirmation accept time, not before dialog opens. order-dock.ts:32-50.

Rename OrderDockComponent→OrderDock (order-dock.ts:17), DayMenuService→DayMenu (daymenu.ts:9); add missing styleUrl to 5 components (worker-area, take-order, day-menu, today-orders, order-dock); fix import grouping/order (Angular→PrimeNG→custom).
Replace native input/select/button with PrimeNG components in take-order.html:30-35, today-orders.html:12-35, day-menu.html:87-92.
Add skeleton components per conventions §12 for Day Menu, Carta, Today Orders loading states. Replace spinner-only loaders.
Extract shared product-options selector component for Day Menu and Carta (eliminate duplicated logic in take-order.ts:92-125 vs day-menu.ts:115-156 and templates).
Replace custom fixed alerts in order-dock.html:4-17 with MessageService/p-toast used by worker shell.

Remove optionsError (never set), unused injections (dock, userName in dashboard; orderService, logger in OrderDock service; hideSidebar in worker-area), fix processing: Set→signal in today-orders.ts:24.
Resolve z-50 overlap between modals and dock (take-order.html:111, day-menu.html:102 vs order-dock.html:22, waiter-dashboard.html:28).
Pull msg from HttpErrorResponse.error.message instead of just instanceof Error. order-dock.ts:75-78, today-orders.ts:81-101.

description: Replace unsafe auto-assign findAvailableTable() with explicit table picker in dock. Waiter chooses table; surface backend conflicts (mesa no disponible, stock insuficiente); invalidate tables after mutation.

tasks.description: Add availableTables signal + loader integration in OrderDockService (or extend MasterData cache). Trigger preload on waiter dashboard init.
UI: table picker inside OrderDockComponent (dropdown or grid) replacing findAvailableTable() auto-assign. Show availability, capacity, location. order-dock.ts:83-85.
Validate selected table before placeOrder; block submit if none selected; reset selection after order created.
Invalidate availableTables cache after order create/cancel; reload tables on dock open. order-dock.ts:65-72.
Surface 409 backend errors ('mesa no disponible', 'stock insuficiente') as specific toasts instead of generic msg. order-dock.ts:75-78.
